items.title: I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works

items.title: Great White Sharks Have Been in the Mediterranean Sea for Millions of Years—but Sightings Are Incredibly Rare

items.title: Microsoft AI chief walks back comments about AI taking over white-collar work
items.summary: Microsoft AI head Mustafa Suleyman is walking back his statement about AI automating jobs done by white-collar workers, including lawyers, accountants, and project managers. items.title: MacOS 27 Golden Gate: Top New Features
items.summary: Apple has announced the latest version of macOS. It’s all about the reintroduction of Siri, which is now accessible from anywhere on the Mac desktop.

items.summary: Anthropic just announced Claude Fable 5, a new AI model it said is the most powerful model it has ever made widely available. items.title: The Top New Features in Apple’s iOS 27 and iPadOS 27
items.summary: Apple took the wraps off iOS 27 at its WWDC event, and the iPhone update is chock-full of smart upgrades, with a big focus on improvements to Siri.

items.title: Anthropic Offers Mythos Upgrade for Cyber Partners and a ‘Safe’ Version for the Rest of You
items.summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Mythos 5 to trusted organizations and Claude Fable 5 to the public, a version it says can’t be used for cyberattacks.

items.title: Apple’s AI promises are finally, almost, sort of here
items.summary: Apple kicked off its annual developer conference with bold promises about AI. The company, CEO Tim Cook said, would be "introducing new technologies and innovations that push the limits on what's possible." But its slew of announcements - centered on a brand-new "Siri AI" - had more to do with catch

items.title: Apple is embracing the fantasy of AI photo editing
items.summary: Apple used to question whether generative AI-powered editing features were worth the risk of distorting our perceptions of the world. Now it seems Apple no longer believes that photos should accurately capture reality. At WWDC 2026, the company announced a host of new AI-powered photo editing tools.

items.title: Apple’s AI pitch will live or die by its privacy promise
items.summary: As expected, yesterday's WWDC keynote was mostly about AI. And also as expected, Apple tried to turn its late arrival into its sales pitch: It didn't rush into AI because it was taking its time to do things right. In this case, "right" means "with more privacy than anyone else." It's a good pitch -

items.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.

items.title: Longevity Startup Doses First Human in Bid to Reverse Age-Related Sight Loss
items.summary: The FDA recently approved the cellular rejuvenation therapy ER-100 for human clinical trials. While vision is the first target, it could have applications for a variety of age-related disease.
